## Key fields to include: Occurrence core

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Occurrence core table (mandatory fields)**

- `occurrenceID` — <span class="small-note">unique, stable ID</span>
- `scientificName` — <span class="small-note">WoRMS</span>
- `basisOfRecord` =  <span class="small-note">"MaterialSample"</span>  
- `eventDate`, `decimalLatitude`, `decimalLongitude`  
- `occurrenceStatus` = <span class="small-note">"present"</span>
::: 
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Occurrence core table (strongly recommended fields)**

- `scientificNameID` <span class="small-note">(WoRMS AphiaID)</span>  
- `organismQuantity` <span class="small-note">(read count of sequence)</span>  
- `associatedSequences` <span class="small-note">(link to e.g. GenBank or ENA accession)</span> 
- `organismQuantityType` = <span class="small-note">"DNA sequence reads"</span> 
 - `sampleSizeValue` <span class="small-note">(total read count in sample)</span>  
- `sampleSizeUnit` = <span class="small-note">"DNA sequence reads"</span> 
- `samplingProtocol` - <span class="small-note">(link to your SOP)</span>

:::
::::
